nasb.text: and through Him to reconcile all things to Himself, having made peace through the blood of His cross; through Him, I say, whether things on earth or things in heaven.

esv.text: and through him to reconcile to himself all things, whether on earth or in heaven, making peace by the blood of his cross.

cnv.text: 並且藉著他在十字架上所流的血成就了和平，使萬有，無論是地上天上的，都藉著他與　神和好了。

ccb.text: 又借着祂在十字架上所流的血成就了和平，使天地万物借着祂与上帝和好。

csbs.text: 又藉着他在十字架上所流的血成就了和平， 就是藉着他使万有——无论地上的或天上的—— 都与他自己和好了。
